dev_focus: BOLT TASK C2496: Add 'Upozornit mě na podobné kousky' PDP opt-in form. (1) Below main CTA on product page: email input + button 'Upozornit mě'. (2) Server Action notifySimilarItem(email, categoryId, sizes, brand?): upsert ProductNotifyRequest in Turso. (3) Success state: '✓ Dáme ti vědět'. Only visible when product not sold. Backend already done — src/lib/email/similar-item.ts + wired in checkout/actions.ts. See TODO Phase 9 for full spec.
notes: C2496 Lead — Video task ✅ marked done in TODO (C2489/C2490). Wishlist task updated: backend exists but PDP form is the MISSING PIECE. New Bolt directive: PDP opt-in form that populates ProductNotifyRequest records. Without this form, the sendSimilarItemNotifications system is dead — backend fires on checkout but no records exist to match. Trace also unpaused. AFTER PDP form: Bolt → delivery deadline tracking OR Packeta shipment creation.

schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name → run_every integer (overrides DB value)

session_manager.kill_zombie_tasks: bool — kill tasks stuck as 'running' for >30min
session_manager.requeue_failed: list of task IDs to requeue (max 5)
session_manager.reset_no_change_counter: bool — prevent auto-pause from consecutive no-change cycles
